creator: oleg.ginzburg@nevosoft.ru
text:
On Thursday 14 July 2011 16:10:32 you wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/retail,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/158890 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/158890

Approve. Please change secondary master sites and my email by attached patch. 
Thanks.
